3264630.name: Astral Enterprises
3264630.description:
Astral Enterprises is not just another factory builder; it's a game of corporate conquest where your greatest asset is your mind. As the CEO of a fledgling corporation, you will turn barren celestial bodies into bustling industrial powerhouses. Every factory is a complex, Tetris-like spatial puzzle, every market fluctuation is an opportunity, and every choice impacts your bottom line.

Do you have what it takes to dominate the final frontier?

Design Your Perfect Factory Forget sprawling, inefficient layouts. In Astral Enterprises, every factory is built on a constrained grid. Each component has a unique shape and size, turning factory design into a challenging and rewarding spatial puzzle. Orchestrate a beautiful, intricate clockwork of inputs and outputs where every single tile matters.

Master Complex Supply Chains Transform raw asteroid ore into high-tech quantum circuits. Each component offers multiple production methods, creating a deep web of strategic trade-offs. Will you choose the cheap method that only requires basic Operators, or the advanced process that produces more but demands expensive Specialists and a massive power grid? The choice is yours, CEO.

Dominate the Sector Economy The market is your playground. Set up sophisticated, automated trading rules to buy low and sell high while you sleep. Establish inter-factory transport routes to create a seamless, empire-wide logistics network. Fulfil lucrative infrastructure contracts for local populations, understanding that their growth is your growth—a more developed planet provides a more valuable workforce and a richer market to exploit.

Manage a Living Workforce Your greatest asset and biggest expense is your people. Manage three distinct tiers of labour: industrious Operators, brilliant Engineers, and irreplaceable Specialists. Compete with rival corporations for talent in a dynamic sector-wide labour market where shortages can dramatically increase your wage bill and cripple your profit margins.

Conquer the Cosmos, Alone or with Rivals Expand your empire from a single factory to a star-spanning corporation. Compete against friends and rivals in multiplayer, fighting over lucrative contracts, manipulating markets, and striving for total economic dominance. Or, build your empire in peace in a rich and rewarding solo experience.

For the Player Who Loves to Optimise

If you love the challenge of building a perfect, self-sustaining machine... If you thrive on mastering complex economic systems and supply chains... If you believe that the solution to any problem is a better-designed factory...

Then Astral Enterprises is built for you.

Add Astral Enterprises to your Steam wishlist today and prepare to build your legacy among the stars.

Astral Enterprises - Your Corporation. Your Cosmos. Your Bottom Line.
